intro: Bergia aestivosa, commonly known as Bergia, is a tropical plant species in the family Elatinaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory infections, due to its reported antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties.
